name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts (text + 7-10 slide carousel), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 5 skills + 1 agent: brief router, text post writer, carousel composer with per-slide image prompts, Depth Score validator (>=80 gate), and end-to-end orchestrator. 12 text hook formulas, 5 cover hook frameworks, 20-rule anti-slop rubric. v0.4.5 switches the carousel canvas from 1:1 (1080×1080) to **3:4 portrait (1080×1440)** — Imagen-native ratio that gives the bilingual headline + visual hook more vertical real estate AND reposts cleanly across LinkedIn (full-bleed), Instagram Feed (center-cropped to 4:5 inner band, no letterbox), and TikTok photo carousel (centered with minor letterbox). Authoring discipline added: headline + brand chrome must stay inside the central 1080×1350 IG-safe zone so cropping never truncates critical text. v0.4.4 retained: 5-act narrative spine HOOK → FORESHADOW → BODY → PEAK → CTA + nyentrik mandate on both HOOK and CTA + upstream carousel-gen plugin as canonical image-craft reference. v0.4.3 retained: top-level caption + hashtags + link_comment with 4 schema invariants. Pure content generation — emits draft JSON for an admin panel to consume.
